emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.description: If there is immediate danger, serious injury, fire, crime, or urgent medical emergency, call 112.
emergency.warning: For emergencies in Bulgaria, call 112. This app does not replace medical, legal, or official advice.

home.badge: Built for Erasmus students, useful for everyone
home.tagline: Built for Erasmus students, useful for everyone
home.heroDescription: A multilingual assistant that helps Erasmus students, foreigners, tourists, and locals discover the city, understand documents, move around, and handle daily life.
home.sampleQuery: Can you help me buy a train ticket to Sofia?
home.sampleResponse: Yes. I'll show you the steps, the Bulgarian phrase to use, and what to check before travel.
home.sampleQuestion: Can you help me buy a train ticket to Sofia?
home.sampleAnswer: Yes. I'll show you the steps, the Bulgarian phrase to use, and what to check before travel.
home.askPlaceholder: Ask anything about Erasmus life in Ruse...

quickPrompts.food: Where can I eat near campus?

home.mapDescription: Find nearby events, hidden gems, campus places, and people to go with — all in one place.
home.step1Desc: Ask a question, upload a document, or pick a topic.
home.step2Desc: ERASMuse translates, summarizes, and creates action steps.
home.step3Desc: Get routes, phrases, checklists, buddies, and guidance.
home.whoAreYouDesc: Pick what fits — we'll personalise your home.

userTypeMessages.erasmus: Great. We'll prioritize university, documents, events, and student-friendly places.
userTypeMessages.tourist: Welcome! We'll focus on hidden gems, safe transport, and friendly local phrases.
userTypeMessages.localStudent: Nice — we'll surface campus events, help with documents, and weekend ideas.
userTypeMessages.localCitizen: Welcome back. We'll keep events, hidden gems, and document help close at hand.
userTypeMessages.other: We'll show you a broad mix — adjust your interests anytime in your profile.

home.subtitle: Your AI companion for studying, living, travelling, and discovering Ruse.

explore.title: Explore Ruse
explore.subtitle: Events, hidden gems, student places, and people to go with.
explore.mapPlaceholder: Click to explore events, places, and hidden gems
explore.askAI: Ask AI to find events, places, food, activities...
explore.moodTitle: Tell us your mood — get a plan
explore.moodPlaceholder: I am free after 18:00, I like music, I have 15 leva, and I don't want to go alone.
explore.mapHint: Click markers to highlight events. Filters update both list and map.

campus.title: Campus Life
campus.subtitle: University facilities, Erasmus information, announcements, events, and first-week help.
campus.checklistSaved: Saved automatically — your progress stays here.

move.title: Move around Ruse and Bulgaria
move.subtitle: Routes, buses, trains, tickets, stations, and travel phrases — explained simply.

travelBuddySection.title: Find a Travel Buddy
travelBuddySection.description: Travel with other students going the same way.

buddies.title: Buddies & Plans
buddies.subtitle: Find people, save events, and build your Erasmus plan.
buddies.safetyNotice: Safety first: meet in public places, avoid sharing personal details too early, and use university or public locations when possible.
buddies.noRequestsDesc: Send an invite to a buddy and you'll see it here.
buddies.inviteSent: Invite prepared — In the real version this would send a safe connection request.

plan.title: My Plan
plan.subtitle: Your saved events, places, routes, and reminders.
plan.emptyDesc: Add events, hidden gems, routes, or reminders to build your Ruse day.

lifeAdmin.title: Life Admin & Health
lifeAdmin.subtitle: Documents, local services, emergency guidance, and healthcare navigation.

options.emergencyDesc: Call 112 immediately. Stay where you are if safe.
options.sickDesc: Visit a clinic. Bring insurance. Use simple words: 'Имам нужда от лекар.'
options.pharmacyDesc: Find an Аптека (green cross). Describe symptom; ask for English instructions.
options.doctorDesc: Visit a GP, bring ID and insurance. Ask for a prescription if needed.
options.medicalDocDesc: Use Document Decoder for a plain explanation.
options.translationDesc: Open ERASMuse Document Decoder or ask the international office.

lifeAdmin.disclaimer: ERASMuse is not a doctor. ERASMuse is not a lawyer. It does not replace official advice.

ask.title: Ask ERASMuse anything
ask.subtitle: Transport, documents, university, events, health, and local life in Ruse.
ask.emptySubtitle: Pick a question below or type your own.

suggestions.trainTicket: How do I buy a train ticket from Ruse to Sofia?
suggestions.contract: Explain this rental contract in simple English.
suggestions.tonight: What can I do tonight in Ruse?
suggestions.directions: How do I get from the University of Ruse to the railway station?
suggestions.doctor: What should I do if I need a doctor?
suggestions.travelBuddy: Find me a travel buddy to Sofia.

ask.waitMessage: Please wait a moment between messages.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Upload and decode documents, contracts, and official letters.
